_rationale: Pins the `-R/--regex` flag plumbing. Note: the C++ run_grep currently ignores the regex flag (src/cli/search.cpp passes `/*use_regex*/` and falls back to literal substring match), so this spec uses a pattern that resolves the same way under literal and regex semantics. The spec exists primarily to lock the flag's exit code and output shape so a future regex implementation lands a deliberate golden update.
